items.title: A Look At Travelers (TRV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
items.description: Travelers Companies (TRV) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price moves, with the stock showing mixed short term performance. At the same time, longer term total returns and current fundamentals invite closer attention. See our latest analysis for Travelers Companies. items.title: Earnings Preview: Travelers (TRV) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
items.description: Travelers (TRV) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

items.title: 5 P&C Insurers Stocks to Watch As the Industry Witnesses Soft Pricing
items.description: Zacks Property and Casualty Insurance players like CB, TRV, CINF, SKWD and HGTY are likely to benefit from digitalization and catastrophes that drive policy renewal rate and pricing.

items.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $316
items.description: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Ryan Tunis   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $308 to $316.
